case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. MAN YIU ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT YIU, MAN DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-06-2021
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66588127) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO 585 CCP IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66588127) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YIU, MAN $1,303.12 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,562.07, SEE SCANNED DOC
